_comment: Map a short voice-friendly alias to a real GitHub repo. Copy this to repos.json (gitignored) and edit. 'numbers' maps spoken numbers to an alias for an unambiguous override ('new issue two ...'). 'interpret_enabled' lets Claude clean noisy dictation into a proper issue and pick the repo when it wasn't stated (needs the `claude` CLI). 'format_enabled' + per-repo 'format' is the older skill-based formatter (config/skills/<name>.md); interpret supersedes it when both are on.
